company.name: Badass Laboratory
company.description: A small software workshop where everyday problems become practical tools.
company.supportBlurb: Everything here is free to explore when available. I don’t expect anyone to support this work, but if you believe in calm, practical software made by a real person, Patreon helps me keep building.

projects.name: Kickstands Up
projects.description: Helping riders spend less time planning and more time riding.

projects.name: Hearth & Hoard
projects.description: A calm place for the people, projects, routines, recipes, documents, and everyday responsibilities that make a house feel like home.

projects.name: Spin-the-Wheel Meal Planner
projects.description: One less decision at the end of a long day.

updates.title: Hearth & Hoard: Under Development
updates.note: H&H v31 is created and working. Development is currently moving into v32.

updates.title: KSU beta demo added
updates.note: Kickstands Up is now featured as the current beta app.
